items.name_cn: /women's bag

Genuine leather
New
Model 1773 23-17-5.5 (includes extended leather shoulder strap)
Mini Nappa Lambskin Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, first released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature twisted knot. The Flamenco Purse has been cleverly redesigned with a delicate knotted top and a soft, sensual draped silhouette. This version is crafted from soft Nappa lambskin.
Crossbody or shoulder carry
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Suede lining
LOEWE hot stamping
): Gold
Material: Lambskin
Weight: 0.2 kg

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Puzzle Edge
Bag Latest version with adjustable strap Burgundy
Lo*we🔥's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of satin calfskin with cage-stitched edges🌟
The mini Puzzle can hold a small vertical wallet, most smartphones (up to 6.1 inches), and a sunglasses case; worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable, detachable strap*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:3000b

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Bag 3001B
24cm Burgundy strap sold separately
The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first tote for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create Puzzle's unique geometric lines. This small bag is made of classic calfskin with overlapping edges.
The small Puzzle bag can hold a large wallet, phone, and sunglasses
Shoulder, crossbody, hand, or clutch carry
Detachable, adjustable strap
Zipper closure with calfskin pull
External zip pocket and internal slip pocket
Customizable with straps and personalized charms
Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Model 1763 Return
Mini Glossy Calfskin Puzzle FoldMini
The Puzzle Fold bag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series, reinterpreting them with geometrically rich architectural patches that can fold completely, making it a great travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo. This mini version is crafted from glossy calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Suede lining
LOEWE hot stamping
16.5-9-20

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
NEW IN l
Large Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5608
Size 22.5-16.5-6.5
Goya is a structured compact bag, very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It is a testament to exquisite craftsmanship and a new LOEWE product worth buying.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Moss green Model 332
Medium soft calfskin Pebble Bucket Tote
Pebble cleverly blends pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design, creating a unique and innovative bag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and function, features an adjustable shoulder strap and fits various carrying ways, and the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. This medium version is made of soft calfskin.
Shoulder or crossbody
Adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic closure
Interior pocket
Synthetic leather lining
Anagram engraved pebble
Size: 24.5*23.5*28cm
